label: Layout part parms
description: Parameters for applying a room part to a room. The element name is the RoomPartDef defName (the 'def' field). Scalar text is treated as the 'chance' field via the defaultValueField shorthand.

def.label: Room part
def.description: RoomPartDef to apply. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability this part is applied (0-1). May also be provided as a scalar text node on the element.

threatPointsRange.label: Threat points range
threatPointsRange.description: Threat point range within which this part is eligible. Uses IntRange.Invalid to mean always eligible.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: How many times this part is applied per room. Uses IntRange.Invalid to mean apply once.
